title: Implement gRPC-Web & JSON Transcoding
description: Architect proxy-based bridges using tools like Envoy to enable browser-side consumption of gRPC services. Implement gRPC-Web and JSON transcoding to expose gRPC services over HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 for web clients.
objectives: Architect proxy-based bridges using tools like Envoy to enable browser-side consumption of gRPC services.
Implement gRPC-Web and JSON transcoding to expose gRPC services over HTTP/1.1 and HTTP/2 for web clients.
